In this lesson, I'm going to give you a quick primer on actually fulfilling your Six Figure Funnel Formula orders. This is if you are selling an information product or a digitally downloadable product. There are three main digital ways to fulfill your products, and each have their pros and cons. The first is what we call the encrypted download. The second is a secure digital delivery platform, or what's more commonly referred to as a membership site. And the third way is what's called the password protected web page. Let's talk a little bit about each of these. First, the encrypted download. Now, some shopping carts, some CRMs, some even email order responders like one shopping cart, for example, they provide this as a built in feature. And so you might be using, depending on if you're using something else besides a web or if you have an existing shopping cart product or platform set up now, it might actually be included in there. The way this works is you're able to provide new customers with an encrypted link. That link expires within a certain number of days, and you can often set that expiration for what it is that you want. So a new customer gets a specific link that they can use to download the product, and that link then is only viable or only good for, let's say, 48, 72 hours. And then after that, that link expires. This way, they can't just share that link with anybody and everybody, because after two to three days, it no longer works. There are also paid services that allow you to do this. So if you don't have a shopping cart or you don't have any kind of ordering process built in that allows you to deliver these encrypted downloads, you can pay a third party company like digitalgoodstore.com, for example, that will take care of that for you. And so digitalgoodstore.com is just one example. If you go to Google and you search for secure digital delivery or secure digital download, you'll be able to find a variety of different applications that you can use to do this. The pro, of course, of using an encrypted download is that it decreases piracy. It decreases the likelihood of your product or software or digital content being passed around because, again, there's a limited time frame that they can download the product, and then after that, it expires. The con, of course, if this isn't built into your current shopping cart or order form process, is that there's an additional fee involved. So for something like digitalgoodstore, it could be $20 a month to securely deliver certain digital products. The next method is the secure digital delivery platform or membership site. Now there are lots of different plugins that you can use for any kind of WordPress site, for example, that will allow you to do this. The plugin that I recommend and the plugin that we use here at marketingfunnelautomation.com is Wishlist Member. And it's a phenomenal plugin because it allows you to customize an entire WordPress website, protect certain content, protect certain content based on different levels, membership levels. So if, for example, you have a membership site or you have a continuity program where you offer a variety of different levels, different memberships, basic, platinum, gold, etc., well, you can set certain pages to be viewable by basic, other pages to only be viewable by gold, and then certainly the premier content only viewable by platinum members. You can use a plugin like Wishlist Member or, and there are other plugins besides Wishlist Member, that's just the one that I recommend, that allow you to sequentially upgrade members week to week. So if you want to, for example, deliver a program or product or training or course where customers, members get new content each week, you can do that very easily with something like Wishlist Member. You can also use these different plugins to have a blog or a main website that allows you to deliver some free content and then have some paid content. Now the pro, of course, is that again, it totally decreases piracy because it prevents people that are not paying nonpaying members from actually seeing your paid content. The other cool thing is that it can very easily be integrated with a Webber. So it's very easy to use, very easy to integrate with a variety of applications, one of which is a Webber and total customization. Now the con is that it's certainly paid and for something like Wishlist Member, if I'm not mistaken, it's in the ballpark of $300. And so of course there's this outlay of money to secure your, your content. The other thing is that with a lot of these plugins, certainly with Wishlist Member, there's a learning curve because there's so many customization options that you have and so much that you can do with it. There's a learning curve, learning how to set up the different levels, learning how to protect the content based on the different levels. There's a good learning curve involved and so you just need to be prepared for that. Now this really is the best method in terms of securing your digital information, your digital content in my personal opinion. But let me tell you about the third way. And the third way is probably the easiest, the quickest, the simplest way to protect your content and to do it for free. Now the cool thing is that it's already built into WordPress. Most users of WordPress don't even realize that they have the ability to password protect certain content, certain pages on their site. But you do and I'm going to show you how to do it in the very next lesson. Now the pro of course is that it's free and it's extremely easy to implement. It takes all of 15 seconds to implement this on a page and you'll see that in the next lesson. The big con with doing this is that the password can be passed around versus the digital delivery platform or membership site like Wishlist member where each member gets their own password and with that password you can limit the number of IP addresses that can be used to log in. Meaning you can set it so that a user can only log in from one IP address or maybe two IP addresses and that's it. With the password protected web page it's the same password for everybody and there's no restrictions on IP address. So that password can very easily be passed around. Now when you're getting started with your six figure funnel I highly encourage you to start with this method. There's no reason to run out and invest the money in an expensive plugin when you're first starting your funnel. You can very easily start off with this password protected method and then as you're generating more and more sales and customers and you see that it's a viable product and a viable funnel then you can move on to a more expensive method like again Wishlist member or another one of those plugins.
